We need to produce JSON with fields. Summarize the authored_text: "What you've listed here are actually _frontend_ tools, in PEP 517 land. They aren't implemented like that, of course, but in the modern world all of these tools would look at a directory of code, infer what tool is needed to compile/layout the files, and then take the compiled files and do their own arrangements. If they used a wheel as an intermediate step and then unpacked it to e.g. turn the files into a `.app` or `.pex`, they start to look a lot more like `pip` (which unpacks a wheel to integrate it into a Python environment) than `setuptools` (which takes sources and produces a wheel-shaped Python library)."
